summary: Phase 40 Safety Score testing complete. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working - Location/Route/Journey score tabs, map click interaction, gauge visualization, signal breakdown, share card with Nagarik branding.

issues: Clipboard write fails with NotAllowedError in automated testing (browser permission issue, not a code bug)

GET /api/safety-score/journey/{session_id} returns journey score with penalties, base_score, alert_count - VERIFIED
Score normalization correctly produces values in 0-10 range (never negative or above 10) - VERIFIED
Signal normalization produces values in 0-1 range - VERIFIED
Percentile ranking returns 1-99 range - VERIFIED
Trend detection returns rising/falling/stable - VERIFIED
Score categories are correct: 8-10=Very Safe, 6-8=Safe, 4-6=Moderate, 2-4=High, 0-2=Critical - VERIFIED

Frontend: Map click triggers location score calculation and shows gauge, breakdown, share card - VERIFIED

seed_data_creation: Using existing data: 622 grid cells, 47 nearby incidents, 1 nearby zone, active guardian session
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 40 Safety Score at /operator/safety-score and /family/safety-score. Login as operator. 3 score types: Location (click map), Route (enter coordinates), Journey (enter session ID). All backend APIs require authentication. Score range 0-10, categories: Very Safe/Safe/Moderate/High/Critical. Dynamic risk engine cache has 622 cells. Trend detection uses heatmap timeline snapshots. Night score calculates with max time risk (8.5).

mocked_apis.redis_cache: Redis cache is implemented as in-memory Python dict
mocked_apis.osrm_routing: OSRM routing uses public server for route sampling

verified_features: Location Safety Score: Click map or enter coordinates to get score with 5 signal layers
Route Safety Score: Enter origin/destination to get route score with risk_zones_crossed and max_risk
Journey Safety Score: Enter session ID to get journey score with penalties and alert breakdown
Signal normalization: All signals normalized to 0-1 range before weighting
Score calculation: Risk index = weighted sum of normalized signals, Score = 10 - (risk_index * 10)
Percentile ranking: Calculated against 622 grid cells from dynamic risk engine cache
Trend detection: Uses heatmap timeline snapshots to detect rising/falling/stable
Night score: Calculates with maximum time risk (8.5) for late night safety indication
Score categories: Very Safe (8-10), Safe (6-8), Moderate (4-6), High Risk (2-4), Critical (0-2)
Score gauge: SVG circular arc with color matching category
Signal breakdown: All 5 signals displayed with progress bars showing normalized values
Share card: Dark theme card with Nagarik branding, score, category, trend, percentile
Share button: Copies score text to clipboard (uses Web Share API if available)
